Title: [VCST-4987] changeCartConfiguredItem — Text customText at maxLength boundary accepted
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-4987 fix: Text section customText at exactly maxLength chars MUST NOT trigger validation error. Uses CFG_TEXT_DRIVEN_COND (CFG-024). BVA: at-boundary value.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.validationErrors.length = 0
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_at_max] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=change_at_max] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors.length = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] customText at maxLength boundary accepted — no validationErrors[] (BVA at-boundary pass). Record actual TEXT_MAX_LENGTH captured for traceability.
Failure_Signals: validationErrors[] non-empty for at-boundary input (pre-fix VCST-4987 over-trigger); addItem itemsCount=0; change_at_max returns errors despite valid length

Title: [VCST-4987] changeCartConfiguredItem — Text customText at maxLength+1 rejected with validationErrors
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-4987 fix counterpart: Text customText EXCEEDING maxLength by 1 char MUST be rejected with validationErrors[] non-empty. BVA past-boundary negative.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item_valid] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item_valid] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=change_over_max] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=change_over_max] data.changeCartConfiguredItem.validationErrors.length >= 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Over-limit input rejected via validationErrors[]; record errorCode and actual TEXT_MAX_LENGTH from get_def.
Failure_Signals: validationErrors[] empty for over-limit input (maxLength enforcement broken)

Title: [VCST-4987] changeCartConfiguredItem — Empty customText on optional Text section accepted
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-4987 edge: empty customText on a non-required Text section MUST NOT trigger maxLength error. Uses CFG_VARIATION_CAKE (textSectionIsRequired=false).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[COUNT label=add_item] data.addItem.validationErrors.length = 0
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Empty customText on optional Text section accepted — maxLength validator does NOT fire for empty string on non-required section.
Failure_Signals: validationErrors[] non-empty for empty customText on optional section
References: xAPI; Mutation.addItem; VCST-4987; CFG_VARIATION_CAKE optional Text section; BL-CART-014

Title: [VCST-5083] addItem × 5 Rapid Sequential Calls — itemsCount Equals N (Lock Stress)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-5083 regression: pre-fix NoLockService caused lost-update under concurrent addItem. Simulates race window via 5 rapid sequential addItem calls for same productId (qty=1 each). Post-fix expectation: itemsQuantity=5, itemsCount=1 (BL-CART-001 merge rule).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_5] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_5] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsQuantity = 5
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] BL-CART-001: addItem accumulates quantity on same productId. itemsCount stays 1; itemsQuantity reaches 5.
Failure_Signals: itemsQuantity < 5 (lost-update — pre-fix lock bug); itemsCount > 1 (duplicate lines)
References: VCST-5083; BL-CART-001; xAPI addItem lock regression; XCart 3.1013.0 fix

Title: [VCST-5083] removeCartItem Immediately After addItem — Cart Reaches Empty
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-5083 race window: addItem → removeCartItem with captured lineItemId. Post-fix: cart empty (itemsCount=0). Pre-fix: stale-read race could no-op the remove.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP cleanup_pre]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_pre]
[GQL-OP add_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "@td(BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY.id)" quantity: 1 }) { id itemsCount items { id productId sku quantity } } }
[GQL-EXEC add_item]
[GQL-CAPTURE add_item.data.addItem.items.0.id → LINE_ITEM_ID]
[GQL-OP remove_item]
  mutation { removeCartItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" lineItemId: "{{LINE_ITEM_ID}}" }) { id itemsCount items { id productId quantity } } }
[GQL-EXEC remove_item]
[GQL-OP read_back]
  query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id itemsCount items { id productId } } }
[GQL-EXEC read_back]
[GQL-OP cleanup_post]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_post]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=remove_item] errors[] empty
[DATA label=remove_item] data.removeCartItem.itemsCount = 0
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsCount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] BL-CART-008: removeCartItem fully removes the line just created. Pre-fix: remove could no-op due to stale read.
Failure_Signals: remove_item.itemsCount = 1 (remove no-op'd — pre-fix lock bug); read_back.itemsCount = 1
References: VCST-5083; BL-CART-008; xAPI removeCartItem lock regression; XCart 3.1013.0 fix
